title: UK Armed Forces Biannual Diversity Statistics Released

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The UK Ministry of Defence has released its biannual diversity statistics for military personnel as of October 2025. This publication provides accredited official data regarding diversity declarations and the representation of protected characteristics within the armed forces.

The statistics aim to enhance transparency and accountability in the armed forces, reflecting efforts to support inclusivity and diversity within military ranks. The heritage of aviation in Scotland is closely linked to these values, emphasizing the importance of community and representation in the aviation sector.

sourceReferences.citationText: mod-press-office – Accredited official statistics: UK armed forces biannual diversity statistics: October 2025
